sections.paragraph:
Original: טהור

Transliteration: ṭehôr

Phonetic: teh-hore'

BDB Definition:

  1. pureness, cleanness, clean, pure
    1. clean (ceremonially - of animals)
    2. pure (physically)
    3. pure, clean (morally, ethically)

Origin: from H2891

TWOT entry: 792b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
